# Potion Belt

## Description

- Upon pickup, gain 2 potion slots.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Best when bought early enough, or with enough remaining gold/rewards, to fill the extra slots; low immediate value if it consumes most gold and leaves the current potion set unchanged.
